event: Portrait of Tsar Ivan IV the Terrible
symbols: golden brocade robe — imperial magnificence and the wealth of the Russian tsardom
tall staff or scepter — the instrument of absolute royal authority and judgment
fur-trimmed cap or crown — the regalia of the Russian tsar, earthly sovereignty
dark ornate archway behind — the enclosed world of the Kremlin, the seat of autocratic power
description: A full-length portrait of a tall, imposing bearded man standing in a richly decorated interior. He wears a long, heavily embroidered golden brocade robe with large floral medallion patterns, fastened with dark clasps down the front. The robe has a dark fur collar and wide sleeves. He holds a long ornamental staff in his left hand and wears a dark jeweled cap. His expression is stern and contemplative, with deep-set eyes gazing slightly to the side.
